reviews.comment:
Hice cambio de aceite y filtros . Precio acordé . Confitería bien. Buena atención y precios accesibles. Demasiada demora para el cambio de aceite.  3 hs .

(Translated by Google)
I had my oil and filters changed. The price was agreed upon. The cafeteria was nice. Good service and affordable prices. The oil change took too long—3 hours.

reviews.comment:
Fuimos a hacer alineación y balanceo. Se puede ir hasta las 19 los días de semana. Excelente el trato y lo dejaron de diez. Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
We went for an alignment and balancing. You can go until 7 PM on weekdays. Excellent service and they did a fantastic job. Highly recommended.
